parameters.jsCode:
const queries = [
  "property management london ontario",
  "commercial property management london ontario",
  "plaza management london ontario",
  "shopping plaza london ontario",
  "facility management london ontario",
  "hotel london ontario",
  "medical clinic london ontario",
  "auto dealership london ontario",
  "restaurant london ontario"
];
return queries.map(q => ({ json: { searchQuery: q } }));

parameters.jsCode: const sd=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global'); const t=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); if(sd.sendDate!==t){sd.sendDate=t; sd.sentToday=0;} sd.sentToday=(sd.sentToday||0)+1; return items;
